question: Which large serif letter is visible inside the light blue picture frame standing on the dark wooden surface? A. B B. P C. D D. R

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A floral arrangement with deep red carnations and eucalyptus sits in a clear glass vase on a dark polished wooden surface. To the left of the flowers stands a light blue cylindrical candle with a smooth matte finish. Behind the arrangement, a light blue wooden picture frame displays a large serif letter D and the text DANIELS on a cream insert.

question: Which of the previously seen entities is back on screen? A. black metal staircase railing with industrial pulley wheel details B. woman with dark skin, black hair in two braids, wearing large gold hoop earrings and a dark blue shirt C. golden-brown tater tots with crispy texture in a black skillet D. hands with light skin tone holding a black and white striped cloth

Both the picture frame with 'D' and the black smartphone were visible D. Neither the picture frame with 'D' nor the black smartphone was visible

options: A. To the left B. To the right C. Behind D. Above

question: What action is the person wearing a blue and white plaid shirt currently performing? A. adjusting lighting B. arranging flowers C. stirring meat D. displaying text
Describe the sequence of visual elements and changes observed throughout the video timeline.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a floral arrangement with red flowers and a blue candle are displayed on a table; at 10s, a woman wearing gold hoop earrings appears speaking in front of the decor; at 18s, the scene shifts to show a container holding chopped pickles, tomatoes, and lettuce on a coaster.

What fresh vegetables are added as toppings after the dish is baked?
canonical_answer: Chopped green lettuce and chopped red tomatoes are sprinkled onto the center of the baked dish.
